1.premise: Predator-catching videos become uncomfortable when the targets seem vulnerable or elected.
Predator-catching videos become retail-store action scenes.

2.premise: Politicians fit naturally among predators who complicate vigilante punishment.

1.premise: A wrong-recipient sext implies rejection, not reciprocated interest.

lines.text: And I like these videos,

lines.text: I feel guilty.

lines.text: I was texting with my fiance the other day,
lines.label: setup
